theme.title: 07 Places and Directions
theme.description: Describe locations in town and ask where things are with estar and prepositions.

lesson.title: Day 11: Places in the City
lesson.instructions: Locate common places and ask for directions with estar, en, a, and de.

exercises.prompt: The pharmacy is on Main Street.
exercises.answer: La farmacia esta en la calle Main.
exercises.answer_alt: La farmacia esta en la calle principal.

exercises.prompt: I am going to the park.
El restaurante esta cerca de la plaza.
exercises.answer: The restaurant is near the plaza.

exercises.prompt: La escuela esta en frente del museo.
exercises.answer: The school is in front of the museum.
exercises.explanation: En frente de is a useful location phrase.

exercises.prompt: The hotel is far from the airport.
exercises.answer: El hotel esta lejos del aeropuerto.

exercises.prompt: There is a cafe next to the station.
exercises.answer: Hay un cafe al lado de la estacion.
exercises.explanation: Al lado de means next to.
